commands.review_summary:
The branch adds trajectory runtime lifecycle event emission to `executePreparedCliRun` and a new Vitest file covering success and run-rejection paths.

PR surface: Source +75, Tests +158. Total +233 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main and v2026.6.10 lack trajectory recorder calls in `executePreparedCliRun`, while the trajectory docs and embedded runner establish the expected lifecycle events; I did not run a live `claude-cli` session.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human handling is needed because the PR has lifecycle/session-state findings and still requires contributor-owned real executor proof before merge.
